description_long: This object consists of two identical benches placed side by side on a dark, flat surface. Each bench features a simple, rectangular wooden seat and a matching wooden backrest, supported by four straight legs. The benches have a minimalist design, with no visible armrests or decorative elements, and the wood appears to be lightly finished, giving a natural look. The legs and supporting structure are also wooden, providing a cohesive appearance. The benches are spaced apart, suggesting they are intended for individual use rather than as a continuous seating unit. This style is commonly found in public parks, bus stops, or urban plazas.
description: Two simple wooden benches with backrests, side by side on a dark surface, featuring straight legs and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both benches side by side, highlighting the wooden seats and backrests.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the profile of the benches, emphasizing the straight legs and the thickness of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view of the benches, showing the backrests and the alignment of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the benches' profiles and leg structure.
